title: The CobbleMMO
description: Cobblemon based modpack for the CobbleMMO server.
body:
**CobbleMMO** is a lightweight Cobblemon-focused modpack built for players who just want to play Pokémon in Minecraft without a bunch of unnecessary bloat.

![CobbleMMO Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78e5fe1b4e9f56e6c45fcc757faceec1cb1a2a96.png)

This pack is built specifically to support the server experience, keeping things very close to base Cobblemon while adding a small set of **quality-of-life and performance mods**. Everything included is there to make the game run smoother and feel better to play, without changing balance or pulling focus away from Pokémon.

There’s no extra modded clutter here, just Cobblemon, optimized and polished for multiplayer. If you’re planning to play on the CobbleMMO server, this is the modpack you’ll need.

What’s included:

- Official modpack for the CobbleMMO Minecraft server
- Mostly vanilla Cobblemon gameplay
- QoL mods that improve usability without affecting balance
- Performance & optimization mods for smoother gameplay
- Multiplayer-first and server-tested
- Almost all mons using https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons
